name: Chodai Co., Ltd.
summary: Chodai Co., Ltd. provides services for various local infrastructure projects in Japan. The company's construction services include studying, planning, designing, asset management, inspection, diagnosis, and testing of bridge repairs and special structures; analysis and experiment of bridges; construction management and supervision; and design for civil structures and facilities. It also studies, plans, designs, and supervises the construction of roads, tunnels, and associated facilities; studies, estimates, evaluates, and plans maintenance for buildings and facilities; studies, plans, and designs local plans, urban plans, regional plans, urban facilities, water supply, pumping stations, and processing facilities; studies, analyzes, plans, and designs river improvements, irrigation, environment, and river structures; provides viability studies for the introduction of PFI and advisory work for PFI; and studies, analyzes, plans, designs, and manages the operation for general traffic plans, road development plans, route plans, and advanced road traffic systems. In addition, the company provides consultancy, system planning, and design services for data processing infrastructure; consultancy, social experiment, system planning, design, and data maintenance services for advanced road traffic systems; and consultancy, system planning, design, software development, data maintenance, and operational management services for road maintenance, as well as plans, produces, and sells software products. Further, it provides planning, designing, project supervision, study, research, and technical supervision services in relation to construction, city planning, and interior design, as well as develops civil engineering products that promote environment conservation and energy saving. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
